title: nephrodium simplex
intro: Nephrodium simplex, also known as the Lady fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium simplex include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, coughs, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
